description: Technical test assignment with deadline — stage test_task, action update_stage
subject: Technical Assignment — SRE Position, DataFlow GmbH
raw_text:
Hi Kirill,

Great speaking with you yesterday! As discussed, please find below the technical assignment for the Site Reliability Engineer position.

Task: Design and implement a basic monitoring setup for a Python microservice using Prometheus and Grafana in Docker Compose. Include alerting rules for latency > 500ms.

Deadline: Please submit via GitHub by June 14, 2026 (23:59 CET).

Send the GitHub link to: tech@dataflow.de

Good luck!

Tobias Richter
Engineering Manager
DataFlow GmbH
